last_run_type: initial setup (candidate for the conviction hypothesis; first decision next morning run)
notes: Created 2026-07-23. Identical to v3-news-directional but requires |score|>=3 to enter (vs 2). Tests, forward and live, whether filtering minimum-conviction entries improves results. Backtest 2019-2023 (gap+US+FII, normal-VIX): entry>=3 turned v3 from -21.4% to +13.1% and cut maxDD from -57% to -13%, but only ~15 trades (small sample). Holds overnight like v3.
